$comment: Single source of truth for per-route SEO metadata. Consumed by scripts/prerender-seo.mjs at build time to emit a distinct dist/<route>/index.html per page, so Googlebot sees unique <title>/<meta>/canonical in the initial HTML instead of identical SPA shells.

routes.title: Kytriq Technologies | Bringing Digital Ideas to Life
routes.description: Kytriq Technologies is a software development company specializing in AI integration, web application development, mobile apps, and strategic digital design. We bring your digital ideas to life.
routes.keywords: Kytriq, software development, AI integration, web development, digital transformation

routes.title: About Us | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: Learn about Kytriq Technologies - a software development company with the heart of a pioneer and precision of a master engineer. We architect digital life.
routes.keywords: about Kytriq, software company, AI solutions, digital innovation, tech startup

routes.title: Services | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: Explore our elite software services: AI Integration, Web & Mobile Apps, Software Development, Strategic Design, Native Performance, and Security Core.
routes.keywords: software services, AI integration, web development, mobile apps, UI/UX design, cybersecurity

routes.title: Projects | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: Explore our selected work and flagship intelligent systems. We specialize in software designed for absolute stability and sub-millisecond precision.
routes.keywords: software projects, case studies, SalePilot, POS system, portfolio

routes.title: SalePilot POS | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: SalePilot is a simple all-in-one POS platform for billing, inventory tracking, transaction records, and basic reports - built for small and growing businesses, even with unstable internet.
routes.keywords: SalePilot, POS system, point of sale, retail management, inventory management, sales reports, offline POS

routes.title: Contact Us | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: Get in touch with Kytriq Technologies. Reach out to us via email, phone, or WhatsApp.
routes.keywords: contact Kytriq, software inquiry, AI consultation, Kytriq phone, Kytriq email

routes.title: Privacy Policy | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: Our privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information at Kytriq Technologies.
routes.keywords: privacy policy, data protection, Kytriq privacy

routes.title: Terms and Conditions | Kytriq Technologies
routes.description: The terms and conditions for using Kytriq Technologies services and website.
routes.keywords: terms and conditions, legal, service agreement, Kytriq terms
